Small Click Targets Test Page

This page contains icon action buttons sized at 24×24px — below the WCAG 2.5.5 minimum of 44×44px. More than 3 such controls should trigger the "Small click targets detected" finding.

Trigger condition: >3 non-inline interactive elements with width or height < 44px. These buttons are 24×24px with display: inline-flex (not exempted as inline text).
